story.title: Capture the effective worker model and show it in the summary
story.description: Extend the subagent execution result with optional model information. Use the configured worker model from frontmatter/settings, update it from Pi JSON events when available, display it in the summary report, and ensure missing metadata remains non-fatal.

project_file_index.role: Extension entry point containing registered slash commands, tools, and orchestration logic.

definition_of_done.description: Verify model capture from configured frontmatter and settings.
Verify model update from runtime Pi JSON events (like model_select and message events).
edge_cases: Actual model updates from model_select JSON event
Actual model updates from message start/update/end JSON events

definition_of_done.description: Verify missing model metadata is non-fatal and falls back gracefully.
edge_cases: Subagents execute successfully without any model metadata

definition_of_done.description: Verify used subagent models are rendered under tasks in summary report.
edge_cases: Each task lists its used subagent model if available in summary report

definition_of_done.description: Verify strict type-checking compiles with zero diagnostics.
edge_cases: TS files compile cleanly with tsc
